name: NDT Surface Scan Path Generation
description: A manufacturing automation engineer needs to program a robot to perform an ultrasonic scan over a curved titanium dome. Using the CoppeliaSim ZMQ Remote API (port 23000), sample the geometry of a spherical primitive shape (radius 1.0m, centered at 0,0,0) across a 5x5 grid in the X-Y plane (X and Y ranging from -0.4 to 0.4 meters). For each point, determine the hit coordinates, outward surface normal, and the 6D tool pose (Euler angles alpha, beta, gamma in radians) required for the tool to face the surface (Z-axis opposite the normal) with its X-axis aligned with the global X-axis. Export the data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/scan_path.csv and a summary to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/scan_report.json. Login credentials: Username `ga`, Password `password123`.
